diagrams.title: Primitive Types Size Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows relative memory sizes of all 8 primitive types
diagrams.purpose: Visualize memory footprint of each primitive type for efficient programming decisions

diagrams.title: Type Promotion Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows automatic type promotion order in Java expressions
elements: byte/short/char → int → long → float → double (bottom to top)
Arrows pointing upward indicate automatic promotion
All operations promote to at least int
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Java handles type conversions in expressions to avoid compilation errors

diagrams.title: Integer Type Ranges
diagrams.description: Shows the range of values for each integer primitive type
diagrams.purpose: Know the limits of each integer type to prevent overflow issues in calculations

diagrams.title: Stack vs Heap Memory
diagrams.description: Shows where primitives and objects are stored in memory
elements: Stack: Local variables, primitives with values
Heap: Objects, arrays, wrapper class instances
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory allocation differences for performance optimization
